# T-N-T Publishing Company

A dual-focus publishing house that handles both books and music, bridging the literary and musical worlds. The brand operates at the intersection of storytelling and sound, serving authors, musicians, and creative professionals looking to bring their work to audiences.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Ignite Your Story &amp; Sound — T-N-T Publishing Company

URL: https://example.com
Description: Where books meet beats. T-N-T Publishing Company amplifies authors and musicians with expert atv music publishing and kindle book publishing services. Start your creative explosion today.

Ignite Your Story & Sound — T-N-T Publishing Company

# Where Stories Meet Sound


### A publishing house for authors and musicians — bridging the literary and musical worlds with editorial craft and sonic vision.


Start Your Project
Explore Publishing Support














## Where Story Meets Sound


T-N-T Publishing bridges the literary and musical worlds, offering a unified home for creators who refuse to be confined to a single medium. From manuscript to master recording, we shepherd your work with editorial precision and strategic vision.










### Book Publishing


Comprehensive editorial development, copy editing, and proofreading that refines your manuscript. We handle cover design, interior layout, and distribution strategy to position your book for kindle book publishing and print audiences alike.










### ATV Music Publishing


Production guidance, mixing oversight, and sonic branding for recording artists. Our atv music publishing support extends to concordia music publishing standards, helping you navigate rights, licensing, and audience-facing presentation.










### Cross-Disciplinary Brand Development


For creators who work across books and music, we build a cohesive brand identity that unifies your literary voice with your sonic signature. Think of it as ascap music publishing meets author platform strategy—one team, one vision.






































## Where Story Meets Sound


We publish across the literary and musical spectrum, bringing novels, poetry, artist projects, and soundtrack releases to audiences who crave depth and craft.









### Novels & Prose


Full-service editorial development, design, and distribution for fiction and narrative non-fiction that demands to be read.









### Poetry Collections


From chapbooks to full-length collections, we shape verse into beautifully crafted editions that honor every line.









### Artist Projects


Bespoke packaging and publishing for musicians and multidisciplinary artists who want their work to live beyond the stream.









### Soundtrack & Recording Releases


We produce and publish original scores, soundtrack albums, and recording projects with the same editorial rigor we bring to books.














## Voices Across the Page & the Studio


We believe the best work comes from thoughtful collaboration. Here's what our authors, musicians, and creative partners have to say about bringing their stories and sounds to life with T-N-T Publishing.











T-N-T Publishing didn't just print my novel—they understood its rhythm. The editorial team treated every chapter like a movement in a symphony, and the final product feels like a true cultural artifact. They bridge the literary and musical worlds with an authenticity I haven't found anywhere else.







Why Choose Us

## Ignite Your Story & Sound


We provide everything you need to bring your creative vision to life — from professional publishing to immersive audio production.










### Professional Publishing


Expert editing, typesetting, and cover design services that transform your manuscript into a polished, market-ready book.









### Studio-Quality Audio


Crystal-clear voice recording, professional mixing, and mastering services that make your audiobook or podcast stand out.









### Global Distribution


Get your work into major online retailers, libraries, and streaming platforms worldwide with our extensive distribution network.









### Marketing & Promotion


Strategic marketing campaigns, social media promotion, and author branding to help you build a loyal audience and boost sales.









### Author Community


Join a thriving community of writers and creators. Collaborate, share insights, and grow together with peer support and mentorship.









### Rights Management


Protect your intellectual property with comprehensive copyright registration, licensing support, and contract negotiation expertise.
















Elara Vance
Author,  The Glass Aria











Working with T-N-T on my album's companion book was a revelation. They captured the essence of each track visually and editorially. It's rare to find a team that respects both the silence between notes and the weight of words.







Marcus Choi
Recording Artist











As an agent, I need partners who elevate my clients' work without ego. T-N-T's dual expertise in publishing and music makes them an indispensable creative studio. Their cultural credibility and polished presentation consistently exceed expectations.







Samira Owusu
Literary & Music Agent



























## Let's Create Something Extraordinary Together


Whether you're an author, musician, agent, or producer — your story deserves to be heard. T-N-T Publishing Company bridges the worlds of literature and music, offering a collaborative home for creative professionals ready to share their work with the world.

## Launch Your Legacy with Expert Publishing — T-N-T Publishing Company

URL: https://example.com/services
Description: From concordia music publishing to kindle book publishing, our dual-focus services bridge literature and music. Explore tailored solutions for authors, musicians, and creative pros now.

Launch Your Legacy with Expert Publishing — T-N-T Publishing Company






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Services
- About



Contact










# Shaping Stories, Sculpting Sound


At T-N-T Publishing Company, we believe every creative work deserves a thoughtful path to its audience. Our services bridge the literary and musical worlds, guiding manuscripts, recordings, and artistic identities from raw potential into polished, publishable cultural works. Whether you are an author refining a manuscript, a musician preparing a release, or a creative professional building a brand, we provide the editorial precision, design sensibility, and strategic positioning your work demands.






Book Publishing





Music Publishing





The craft behind every publication — where literature meets sound.















## Strategic Publishing for Authors & Musicians


T-N-T Publishing bridges the literary and musical worlds with a dual-focus approach that honours craft and amplifies reach. From editorial shaping and production guidance to release positioning and rights management, every service is designed to present your work with clarity, confidence, and cultural impact.


Whether you are ready to publish a manuscript or position a new record, our editorial and strategic teams work alongside you to refine the material, build the narrative, and connect with the audiences who matter most.







### Editorial Shaping & Manuscript Development


Deep structural editing, line refinement, and narrative coaching that transforms a draft into a publishable book while preserving the author's voice and intent.




### Book Production & Distribution


Full-service book publishing including cover design, typesetting, print coordination, and digital distribution across Kindle and global retail platforms.




### Music Publishing & Rights Administration


Comprehensive music publishing support covering copyright registration, licensing, royalty collection, and catalogue management for songwriters and composers.




### Release Positioning & Audience Strategy


Strategic launch planning, media outreach, playlist pitching, and promotional campaigns that position your book or music release for maximum visibility and engagement.











## Our Publishing Process


From raw manuscript or demo to a polished, audience-ready release. We guide creators through every stage of the journey, bridging literature and music with a unified editorial approach.











### Discovery & Consultation


We begin by understanding your creative vision, whether it's a novel, a poetry collection, or a music album. Through collaborative conversations, we assess the project's scope, target audience, and artistic goals. This foundational phase ensures that every subsequent step is aligned with your unique voice and the broader cultural context of your work.















### Editorial & Production Development


Our dual-focus team applies rigorous editorial standards to manuscripts and high-fidelity production techniques to music recordings. We handle developmental editing, line editing, mixing, and mastering. This stage transforms raw material into a cohesive, professional product, ensuring that both literary rhythm and musical narrative are finely tuned.















### Design & Brand Refinement


Every release deserves a striking visual identity. We craft bespoke cover art, interior layouts, and album packaging that reflect the essence of the work. From typography selection to color grading, our design process ensures your publication stands out on bookshelves, streaming platforms, and in the hands of your audience.















### Launch & Audience Presentation


The final stage brings your work to the world. We coordinate distribution for both print and digital formats, assist with metadata optimization for Kindle and music publishing platforms, and provide strategic guidance for launch events. Whether you're releasing a novel or an EP, we ensure your work reaches the ears and eyes it deserves.



























## Where Storytelling Meets Sound


T-N-T Publishing unites the literary and musical worlds under one roof, offering a seamless creative home for authors, composers, and independent artists who refuse to be confined to a single medium.











### Cross-Medium Expertise


From Kindle book publishing to ASCAP music publishing, our team navigates both industries with equal fluency. We understand the nuances of ISBN registration, distribution channels, performance rights organizations, and digital streaming platforms—so your work reaches audiences wherever they discover content.











### Curated Brand Sensibility


Every project receives a bespoke editorial treatment—thoughtful cover design, typographic refinement, and sonic branding that honors your artistic identity. We don't mass-produce; we craft cultural artifacts that stand apart in a crowded marketplace.











### Collaborative Independent Support


You retain creative control while we handle the business infrastructure. Whether you're an emerging songwriter seeking Concordia music publishing partnerships or an author launching your debut novel, our hands-on team provides editorial guidance, production management, and strategic promotion tailored to independent creators.














## Ready to bring your story or sound to life?


We partner with authors, songwriters, and creative professionals to craft publishing experiences that honor your vision. Whether you're shaping a manuscript or mastering a score, our team is ready to explore the possibilities with you.

Start the conversation














Where literature and music meet — crafting immersive editorial experiences that resonate across pages and soundwaves.

## The Fusion of Ink &amp; Audio — T-N-T Publishing Company

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Discover how T-N-T Publishing Company unites the literary and musical worlds. Built for storytellers and sound creators, we redefine ascap music publishing and book production.

The Fusion of Ink & Audio — T-N-T Publishing Company






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Services
- About



Contact
















# Where LiteratureMeets Sound


T-N-T Publishing Company operates at the intersection of storytelling and sound, cultivating a catalog that unites literary craft with musical vision. We are a dual-focus publishing house built for authors, songwriters, and creative professionals who demand work shaped with taste, precision, and deep audience awareness.


From Kindle book publishing to ASCAP music publishing and Concordia music publishing partnerships, our editorial process treats every project as a cultural artifact—whether it lands on a page, a playlist, or both.


















## A House Built on Sound & Story


T-N-T Publishing was founded on a simple belief: that the rhythm of a sentence and the melody of a song come from the same creative source.












In an industry that often asks creators to choose between the written word and the musical note, we saw an opportunity to build a bridge. Our dual-focus publishing house was born from the conviction that literature and music are not separate disciplines, but two expressions of the same human impulse: to tell stories that resonate.


Whether we are guiding an author through the journey of kindle book publishing or helping a songwriter navigate the complexities of atv music publishing, our approach remains steadfastly personal. We treat every manuscript and every master recording as a cultural artifact deserving of meticulous care.




Our team understands that publishing is both cultural stewardship and contemporary audience connection. We don't just put work into the world; we amplify it. From navigating concordia music publishing rights to crafting immersive literary experiences, our role is to ensure your voice finds its audience without compromise.


We believe that every creator deserves a partner who sees the full picture—someone who understands that a book can have a soundtrack and a song can have a narrative arc. At T-N-T, we're not just publishing content; we're curating a legacy of sound and story.





























## Our Core Values


Guided by artistic integrity, disciplined craft, and cross-medium collaboration, we bridge the literary and musical worlds to publish works that resonate deeply and endure.












### Artistic Integrity


We believe every manuscript and composition deserves to be published with its creative vision intact. Our editorial process preserves the author's voice while refining the work to its fullest potential, ensuring authenticity from first note to final page.









### Disciplined Craft


Publishing excellence demands rigorous attention to detail. From developmental editing and music engraving to cover design and production, we apply meticulous craftsmanship at every stage, treating each project as a bespoke artifact worthy of its audience.









### Cross-Medium Collaboration


We operate at the intersection of storytelling and sound, fostering partnerships between authors, composers, and visual artists. This collaborative ecosystem produces richer, more immersive publications that transcend traditional boundaries and reach diverse audiences.











## The Editorial Ensemble


Our leadership brings together decades of experience across literary publishing, music licensing, and artist development — united by a belief that great stories deserve to be heard as well as read.









### Elara Voss


Publishing Director


Shapes the literary voice of T-N-T, guiding manuscripts from acquisition through to bound book with an editor's precision and a producer's ear for rhythm.









### Kiran Desai


Creative Development Lead


Bridges the gap between manuscript and melody, overseeing our music publishing catalogue and developing innovative cross-format projects that defy easy categorisation.









### Margot Sinclair


Artist & Author Relations


Nurtures the creative relationships at the heart of T-N-T, ensuring every author and musician who walks through our doors feels championed, understood, and brilliantly supported.













## Voices of Trust & Taste


A dual fluency across literary and musical worlds — here's what our collaborators say about bringing their work to life with T-N-T Publishing.









"T-N-T understood the rhythm of my prose before I even finished the manuscript. They didn't just publish my novel — they amplified its musicality, treating every chapter like a movement in a symphony."



Clara Vane
Author,  The Glass Interval








"As a composer, I needed a publisher who could hear the score behind the silence. T-N-T bridged the gap between my sheet music and the storytelling it deserved, creating a release that feels like a literary album."



Marcus Thorne
Composer,  Echo Atlas














Where literature and music meet — crafting immersive editorial experiences that resonate across pages and soundwaves.

# Start a Conversation


Whether you're an author, musician, agent, label, or producer, we're here to talk about publishing, positioning, and creative development. Let's build something resonant together.








### Authors & Writers


Publishing, editorial development, and distribution for literary voices. From kindle book publishing to print, we shape stories that last.







### Musicians & Composers


ATV music publishing, concordia music publishing, and ASCAP music publishing support. We amplify your sound from score to stream.







### Agents & Producers


Strategic partnerships for agents, labels, and creative producers. Let's align on positioning and bring projects to market with impact.














## Start Your Project


Whether you're an author shaping a manuscript or a musician ready to publish your next work, we're here to help. Reach out and let's build something lasting.

### Prefer Direct Contact?


We welcome both book and music publishing inquiries. Our team typically responds within 1–2 business days.

Stories & Sound. Published.









## Frequently Asked Questions






### Who does T-N-T Publishing work with?


We partner with authors, musicians, and creative professionals who operate at the intersection of storytelling and sound. Whether you're a novelist looking to publish a manuscript, a composer seeking sheet music distribution, or an artist exploring cross-format projects, our dual-focus house is built to bridge the literary and musical worlds.





### What types of projects are a good fit?


We look for projects that carry a distinct voice and a commitment to craft. This includes literary fiction, narrative nonfiction, poetry collections, full-length music albums, experimental scores, and illustrated editions. If your work blends genres or pushes the boundaries between page and performance, it's likely a strong fit for our catalog.





### How early should I reach out in the creative process?


We encourage creators to contact us once they have a polished draft or a near-complete body of work. For book projects, a finished manuscript or a substantial sample with a synopsis is ideal. For music publishing, a mastered recording or a portfolio of compositions allows us to assess the project accurately. Early conversations are welcome, but we find the most productive collaborations begin when the work is fully formed.





### What is the emphasis of your collaboration process?


Collaboration at T-N-T is rooted in editorial partnership. We emphasize close creative dialogue, meticulous production values, and a shared vision for bringing your work to audiences. Every project receives hands-on attention from our editorial and production teams, ensuring that the final product honors your original intent while meeting the highest standards of publishing craftsmanship.

















## Begin Your Publishing Journey


Whether your story lives in words, sound, or the space between, T-N-T is ready to listen. Our team bridges literary craft and musical innovation—let's create something that resonates.


Start the Conversation













Where literature and music meet — crafting immersive editorial experiences that resonate across pages and soundwaves.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy


















## Where Story Meets Sound


We publish across the literary and musical spectrum, bringing novels, poetry, artist projects, and soundtrack releases to audiences who crave depth and craft.







# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/11/2026



T-N-T Publishing Company ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: T-N-T Publishing Company

- Email: tntpub.co@consultant.com

- Phone: 13372413899

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement


















## Where Story Meets Sound


We publish across the literary and musical spectrum, bringing novels, poetry, artist projects, and soundtrack releases to audiences who crave depth and craft.







# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 11, 2026



T-N-T Publishing Company is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: T-N-T Publishing Company

- Email: tntpub.co@consultant.com

- Phone: 13372413899



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions


















## Where Story Meets Sound


We publish across the literary and musical spectrum, bringing novels, poetry, artist projects, and soundtrack releases to audiences who crave depth and craft.







# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 11, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - T-N-T Publishing Company

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Publishing provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


T-N-T Publishing Company provides Publishing through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by T-N-T Publishing Company. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: T-N-T Publishing Company

- Email: tntpub.co@consultant.com

- Phone: 13372413899

- Address: [business_address]
